mapper.select: SELECT a.character_no, a.prefer_genre_id, b.prefer_genre_nm FROM tb_character_prefer_genre a INNER JOIN tb_prefer_genre b ON a.prefer_genre_id = b.prefer_genre_id WHERE b.use_yn = 'Y' AND a.character_no = #{characterNo} UNION ALL SELECT a.character_no, b.prefer_disp_id, b.prefer_disp_nm FROM tb_character_prefer_disp A INNER JOIN tb_prefer_disp b ON a.prefer_disp_id = b.prefer_disp_id WHERE a.character_no = #{characterNo} AND b.use_yn = 'Y'

SELECT b.character_no, a.prefer_disp_id, a.prefer_disp_nm, a.disp_type, a.disp_props_type FROM tb_prefer_disp a INNER JOIN tb_character_prefer_disp b ON a.prefer_disp_id = b.prefer_disp_id WHERE a.use_yn = 'Y' AND b.character_no = #{characterNo}

SELECT a.character_no, b.prefer_genre_id, c.prefer_genre_nm FROM tb_character_prefer_disp a INNER JOIN tb_map_prefer_genre_prefer_disp b ON a.prefer_disp_id = b.prefer_disp_id INNER JOIN tb_prefer_genre c ON b.prefer_genre_id = c.prefer_genre_id WHERE character_no = #{characterNo}
